basic_details.job_title: IAF Agniveervayu Musician Recruitment 2026 (Intake 01/2027) - Apply Online, Eligibility, Dates
basic_details.job_category: Unmarried Indian Male and Female Candidates
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Air Force has released the recruitment notification for Agniveervayu (Musician) Intake 01/2027, inviting unmarried Indian male and female candidates from all districts of all states and Union Territories to join the Indian Air Force as part of the Air Force Band. Online registration opens on 20 July 2026, and the pre-registered recruitment rally will be held from 31 August 2026 to 09 September 2026 at two venues: 2 ASC, Air Force Station New Delhi, and 7 ASC, Bengaluru. Candidates must have passed Matriculation/10th along with proficiency in playing a musical instrument. This articl

important_dates.medical examination: September 2026 (at 11 AFH, Hindon and SMC, AF Stn Jalahalli)

application_fee.details: Application fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances and cannot be carried forward to any other recruitment or selection process.

age_limit.maximum_age: 22 years (if a candidate clears all stages of selection)
age_limit.details: No separate age relaxation categories are specified in this notification.

qualification.details: Open to Indian candidates from all districts of all States and all Union Territories of India. | Passed Matriculation/10th or equivalent with minimum pass marks from any Central, State or Union Territory Government recognised School/Board, as on the date of registration. | Only unmarried male and female candidates are eligible. Candidates must undertake not to marry during the four-year engagement period; violation leads to dismissal from service. Female candidates must additionally undertake not to become pregnant during the engagement period.

vacancy_details.details: The number of vacancies for Agniveervayu (Musician) Intake 01/2027 is Not specified in the official notification.

salary_details.details: Agniveervayu (Musician) will be paid an Agniveer package of ₹30,000 per month in the first year, with a fixed yearly increment, along with Risk and Hardship allowances, Dress and Travel allowances, and perks such as ration, clothing, accommodation, and Leave Travel Concession (LTC) as per existing rules. | Total contribution to the Agniveer Corpus Fund after four years is approximately ₹5.02 lakh from the Agniveervayu's own contribution, matched by approximately ₹5.02 lakh from the Government of India. On exit after four years, this totals approximately ₹10.04 lakh as the Seva Nidhi package (excluding interest). There is no Provident Fund contribution requirement, and no gratuity or pensionary benefits are applicable. | Agniveervayu will also be provided non-contributory Life Insurance cover of ₹48 lakh for the duration of the four-year engagement period.

selection_process: Selection for Agniveervayu (Musician) Intake 01/2027 involves the following stages

Verification of Eligibility Documents - original or DigiLocker-verified educational certificates and other applicable documents are scrutinised at the rally venue before the Physical Fitness Test. Physical Fitness Test (PFT-I) - 1.6 km run: within 7 minutes for male candidates
within 8 minutes for female candidates. Physical Fitness Test (PFT-II) - conducted after 10 minutes of recuperation: Male candidates: 10 push-ups (1 minute)
with rest breaks between each exercise. Female candidates: 10 sit-ups (1 minute 30 seconds)
with rest breaks between exercises. English Written Test - objective type
based on Matriculation/10th CBSE syllabus. Candidates must qualify this test. Answers are marked on an OMR sheet
and results are declared the same day. Music Proficiency Test (MPT) - candidates who qualify the English written test undergo a proficiency test in playing musical instruments
conducted individually or in groups. Medical Examination - conducted in September 2026 at 11 AFH
and (for female candidates) ultrasonography of the lower abdomen and pelvis.
1 mark for every correct answer. 0 marks for an unattempted question. 0 marks if more than one answer is given for a question. No negative marking for a wrong answer.
Candidates declared medically unfit may apply for an Appeal Medical Board (AMB) by depositing ₹40 through e-MRO/MRO
within three working days of the medical examination.
how_to_apply: Visit the official CASB recruitment portal: https://iafrecruitment.edcil.co.in.
Step I - Registration: Enter personal and contact details and click "Generate OTP." OTPs are sent separately to the registered mobile number and e-mail ID; enter both to verify.
Agree to the terms and conditions, re-verify the entered details, and click "Submit." A User ID and password will be sent to the registered e-mail ID and mobile number.
Click "Go To Application" to proceed to Step II.

Step II - Filling the Application: Complete Personal details, Communication details, Qualification details, Declaration, and upload the required documents/images (photograph, signature, parent's signature if below 18, left thumb impression, and a live image capture for photo matching).
Preview the filled application, correct any errors, and click "Submit."
Pay the non-refundable application fee of ₹100 plus 18% GST via Net Banking, Debit/Credit Card, or UPI.
Print and retain the submitted application form (PDF) for future reference.

Candidates must indicate two choices of rally venue in order of preference during registration; however, CASB reserves the right to allot a venue irrespective of the candidate's preference. Each candidate may apply only once - multiple applications with different registration numbers will be rejected.
important_instructions: Registration is online only; no offline mode is available. Mobile phones, smart watches, and electronic devices are strictly prohibited in testing areas; candidates found with such devices will be permanently debarred. Candidates must not write or mark anything on the Provisional Admit Card, failing which they will be permanently debarred. No bribe or payment is required at any stage of selection; candidates should be alert to impersonators and fraudulent agents. The Provisional Select List (PSL) will be valid for six months from the date of display and applies only to Agniveervayu (Musician) Intake 01/2027. Inclusion in the PSL does not guarantee enrolment; enrolment is strictly merit-order, subject to medical fitness, vacancy availability, and the 22-year age cap at the time of enrolment. Any corrigendum or update will be published only on the CASB web portal - not in newspapers or other media. In case of any variation between the English and Hindi/regional-language versions of the notification, the English version is authentic.

content_sections.heading: IAF Agniveervayu Musician Recruitment 2026: Quick Overview

rows.details: Unmarried Indian Male and Female Candidates
2 ASC C/O Race Course Camp, Air Force Station New Delhi (New Delhi) and 7 ASC, No. 1 Cubbon Road, Bengaluru (Karnataka)
All districts of all States and all Union Territories of India

content_sections.heading: IAF Agniveervayu Musician Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised to register early, as no extension of registration dates will be given. Requests for change of examination centre, rally date, or medical examination date are not entertained.

rows.date_time: September 2026 (at 11 AFH, Hindon and SMC, AF Stn Jalahalli)

content_sections.heading: IAF Agniveervayu Musician: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The number of vacancies for Agniveervayu (Musician) Intake 01/2027 is Not specified in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for IAF Agniveervayu Musician Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Open to Indian candidates from all districts of all States and all Union Territories of India. Passed Matriculation/10th or equivalent with minimum pass marks from any Central, State or Union Territory Government recognised School/Board, as on the date of registration. Only unmarried male and female candidates are eligible. Candidates must undertake not to marry during the four-year engagement period; violation leads to dismissal from service. Female candidates must additionally undertake not to become pregnant during the engagement period.

content_sections.heading: Musical Proficiency Requirements
content_sections.text: Musical ability is a mandatory qualifying requirement in addition to the educational qualification. Candidates must have proficiency in music with accuracy in tempo and pitch, and must be able to sing one complete song. Candidates must be able to perform one preparatory tune and demonstrate knowledge of a notation system (Staff notation, Tablature, Tonic Solfa, Hindustani, or Carnatic). Candidates must be able to tune individual instruments (where applicable) and match unknown notes on vocal or instruments. Candidates must have proficiency in playing at least one instrument from List A or List B below. It is desirable (though not mandatory) to have proficiency in two instruments - one from each list. Candidates must possess any one of the following: Grade 5th or equivalent (or above) in one instrument from a recognised music institute such as TCL, RSM, KM Music Conservatory Bangalore, Bangalore School of Music, TSM, GMI, or Berklee School of Music, OR A Diploma or equivalent in music for candidates performing Hindustani or Carnatic Classical Music from any recognised university, OR Certificate of participation/awards presented at various events (applicable for candidates performing on blowing instruments with staff notation as per the educational QRs).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: No separate age relaxation categories are specified in this notification.

rows.detail: Born between 01 January 2005 and 01 July 2009 (both dates inclusive)
22 years (if a candidate clears all stages of selection)

content_sections.heading: Mandatory Medical Standards
content_sections.text: Candidates with a history of LASIK/PRK surgery will not be accepted. Body tattoos are permitted only on the inner forearm, back (dorsal) of the hand, or as per tribal custom; offensive/obscene/indecent tattoos anywhere on the body are disqualifying. Consumption, possession, storage or distribution of narcotic drugs and psychotropic substances is a reject criterion, and the IAF follows a zero-tolerance policy on alcoholism and substance abuse.

rows.standard: Minimum 152 cms (147 cms for North East/hilly regions of Uttarakhand ethnicity; 150 cms for Lakshadweep ethnicity, with domicile certificate)
Proportionate to height and age as applicable for IAF
Minimum circumference 77 cms; minimum expansion 5 cms
Able to hear forced whisper from 6 metres, each ear separately
Minimum 14 dental points; healthy gums; dental implants not awarded points; fixed/removable orthodontic appliances - unfit
6/12 each eye, correctable to 6/6 each eye

content_sections.heading: Salary and Pay Package
content_sections.text: Agniveervayu (Musician) will be paid an Agniveer package of ₹30,000 per month in the first year, with a fixed yearly increment, along with Risk and Hardship allowances, Dress and Travel allowances, and perks such as ration, clothing, accommodation, and Leave Travel Concession (LTC) as per existing rules. Total contribution to the Agniveer Corpus Fund after four years is approximately ₹5.02 lakh from the Agniveervayu's own contribution, matched by approximately ₹5.02 lakh from the Government of India. On exit after four years, this totals approximately ₹10.04 lakh as the Seva Nidhi package (excluding interest). There is no Provident Fund contribution requirement, and no gratuity or pensionary benefits are applicable. Agniveervayu will also be provided non-contributory Life Insurance cover of ₹48 lakh for the duration of the four-year engagement period.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances and cannot be carried forward to any other recruitment or selection process.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for Agniveervayu (Musician) Intake 01/2027 involves the following stages, conducted in sequence: Verification of Eligibility Documents - original or DigiLocker-verified educational certificates and other applicable documents are scrutinised at the rally venue before the Physical Fitness Test. Physical Fitness Test (PFT-I) - 1.6 km run: within 7 minutes for male candidates, within 8 minutes for female candidates. Physical Fitness Test (PFT-II) - conducted after 10 minutes of recuperation: Male candidates: 10 push-ups (1 minute), 10 sit-ups (1 minute), 20 squats (1 minute), with rest breaks between each exercise. Female candidates: 10 sit-ups (1 minute 30 seconds), 15 squats (1 minute), with rest breaks between exercises. English Written Test - objective type, 30 questions, 30 minutes duration, based on Matriculation/10th CBSE syllabus. Candidates must qualify this test. Answers are marked on an OMR sheet, and results are declared the same day. Music Proficiency Test (MPT) - candidates who qualify the English written test undergo a proficiency test in playing musical instruments, conducted individually or in groups. Medical Examination - conducted in September 2026 at 11 AFH, Hindon and SMC, AF Station Jalahalli, including blood, urine, biochemistry, chest X-ray, ECG, and (for female candidates) ultrasonography of the lower abdomen and pelvis. 1 mark for every correct answer. 0 marks for an unattempted question. 0 marks if more than one answer is given for a question. No negative marking for a wrong answer. Candidates declared medically unfit may apply for an Appeal Medical Board (AMB) by depositing ₹40 through e-MRO/MRO, within three working days of the medical examination.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents for the Recruitment Rally
content_sections.text: Musical instrument (from List A or B) for the practical test HB pencil, eraser, sharpener, glue stick, stapler, and black/blue ball point pen Colour printout of the Provisional Admit Card Colour printout of the duly filled application form Eight recent, un-attested passport size colour photographs (with candidate holding a black slate showing name and photo date in white chalk) Original or DigiLocker-verified printout and four self-attested photocopies of Matriculation passing certificate and mark sheet Original and four self-attested photocopies of the Musical Experience Certificate Children of Air Force Personnel (COAFP) Certificate, or Service Book/Discharge Book/Casualty Service Certificate, as applicable (original and four self-attested photocopies) NOC from employer, in original and four self-attested photocopies, for candidates serving in a government organisation (if applicable) Discharge Certificate, original and four self-attested photocopies, for candidates discharged from Indian Army/Navy/other Government organisation Body tattoo photographs (close-up and distant view), if applicable NCC 'A', 'B', or 'C' Certificate, original and four self-attested photocopies (if applicable) Aadhaar Card (or other valid photo ID for candidates from J&K, Ladakh, Assam and Meghalaya) Signed Consent Form for PFT and Medical Tests (parent/guardian signature required if the candidate is below 18 years of age) Candidates cannot appear in the rally without original educational marksheets/certificates, except where a Principal's certificate confirms the originals are deposited with the college/institution, or where DigiLocker-verified certificates are produced along with an accessible mobile device.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IAF Agniveervayu Musician Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official CASB recruitment portal: https://iafrecruitment.edcil.co.in . Step I - Registration: Enter personal and contact details and click "Generate OTP." OTPs are sent separately to the registered mobile number and e-mail ID; enter both to verify. Agree to the terms and conditions, re-verify the entered details, and click "Submit." A User ID and password will be sent to the registered e-mail ID and mobile number. Click "Go To Application" to proceed to Step II. Step II - Filling the Application: Complete Personal details, Communication details, Qualification details, Declaration, and upload the required documents/images (photograph, signature, parent's signature if below 18, left thumb impression, and a live image capture for photo matching). Preview the filled application, correct any errors, and click "Submit." Pay the non-refundable application fee of ₹100 plus 18% GST via Net Banking, Debit/Credit Card, or UPI. Print and retain the submitted application form (PDF) for future reference. Candidates must indicate two choices of rally venue in order of preference during registration; however, CASB reserves the right to allot a venue irrespective of the candidate's preference. Each candidate may apply only once - multiple applications with different registration numbers will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Registration is online only; no offline mode is available. Mobile phones, smart watches, and electronic devices are strictly prohibited in testing areas; candidates found with such devices will be permanently debarred. Candidates must not write or mark anything on the Provisional Admit Card, failing which they will be permanently debarred. No bribe or payment is required at any stage of selection; candidates should be alert to impersonators and fraudulent agents. The Provisional Select List (PSL) will be valid for six months from the date of display and applies only to Agniveervayu (Musician) Intake 01/2027. Inclusion in the PSL does not guarantee enrolment; enrolment is strictly merit-order, subject to medical fitness, vacancy availability, and the 22-year age cap at the time of enrolment. Any corrigendum or update will be published only on the CASB web portal - not in newspapers or other media. In case of any variation between the English and Hindi/regional-language versions of the notification, the English version is authentic.

faq.question: Q1. When does online registration start for IAF Agniveervayu Musician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online registration starts at 1100 Hrs on 20 July 2026 and closes at 2300 Hrs on 02 August 2026 on the official portal, https://iafrecruitment.edcil.co.in.

faq.question: Q2. When and where will the pre-registered recruitment rally be held?
faq.answer: The rally will be held from 31 August 2026 to 09 September 2026 at two venues: 2 ASC, Air Force Station New Delhi, and 7 ASC, No. 1 Cubbon Road, Bengaluru.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for IAF Agniveervayu Musician Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be born between 01 January 2005 and 01 July 2009 (both dates inclusive). The upper age limit at the time of enrolment, after clearing all selection stages, is 22 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Matriculation/10th or equivalent with minimum pass marks from any Central, State, or UT Government recognised School/Board.

faq.question: Q5. Is proficiency in a musical instrument mandatory?
faq.answer: Yes. In addition to the 10th pass qualification, candidates must demonstrate music proficiency and be able to play at least one instrument from List A or List B specified in the notification, along with a valid musical experience certificate.

faq.question: Q6. Can married candidates apply for Agniveervayu Musician recruitment?
faq.answer: No. Only unmarried male and female candidates are eligible. Candidates must undertake not to marry during the four-year engagement period, failing which they will be dismissed from service.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary of an IAF Agniveervayu Musician?
faq.answer: The starting Agniveer package is ₹30,000 per month in the first year, rising to ₹40,000 per month by the fourth year, with a fixed yearly increment plus applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for IAF Agniveervayu Musician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹100 plus 18% GST, and it is non-refundable under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Agniveervayu Musician?
faq.answer: Selection involves document verification, Physical Fitness Test (PFT-I and PFT-II), English Written Test, Music Proficiency Test, and a Medical Examination, conducted in that sequence.

faq.question: Q10. Will Agniveervayu get Ex-Servicemen (ESM) status after four years?
faq.answer: No. Agniveervayu enrolled under this scheme are not eligible for Ex-Servicemen status after discharge on completion of the four-year engagement period.
